6:
SELECT 
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth y JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' AND c.Segment = 'SME') - 
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth y JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' AND c.Segment = 'LAM') AS SME_LAM,
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth y JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' AND c.Segment = 'LAM') - 
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth y JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' AND c.Segment = 'KAM') AS LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth y JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' AND c.Segment = 'KAM') - 
    (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth y JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' AND c.Segment = 'SME') AS KAM_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7: SELECT segments.segment, (SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(yearmonth.date) = 2013 THEN segments.consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(yearmonth.date) = 2012 THEN segments.consumption ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(yearmonth.date) = 2013 THEN segments.consumption ELSE 0 END) * 100 AS percentage_increase FROM segments JOIN yearmonth ON segments.segment = yearmonth.segment GROUP BY segments.segment ORDER BY percentage_increase DESC;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
